MOVING PARTY MUST DELIVER COMPLETE COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN OCTOBER 27, 2014 AT 4:00 PM OR THE MOTION WILL BE DENIED. MOVING PARTY ONLY PROVIDED THE FIRST TWO PAGES OF THE MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES. ANY EXHIBIT MUST BE SEPARATED BY AN EXHIBIT TAB PER CRC 3.1110(F). THE COURT HAS COURTESY COPIES OF THE OPPOSITION PAPERS. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT, NOT REPORTED. (302)

Joinder To Deft James Spingola'S Mo To Stay Action; Proof Of Service
Off Calendar Oct-27-2014 Continued To Nov-13-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT COLLECTIVE IMPACT Joinder To Deft James Spingola'S Mo To Stay Action is continued to November 13, 2014 to give moving party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Moving party must deliver complete courtesy copies of the moving papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than October 27, 2014 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be denied. Moving party only provided the first two pages of the Memorandum of Points and Authorities. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). The court has courtesy copies of the opposition papers. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, Not reported. =(302/EHG)
